tier1_core.label: Tier 1 Core
tier1_core.description: Highest-volume national corridors between major metro freight hubs. These are the lanes with proven demand and carrier density.

tier1_to_tier2_expansion.label: Tier 1 → Tier 2 Expansion
tier1_to_tier2_expansion.description: Expansion lanes connecting major hubs to growth markets. Lower initial volume but high growth potential.
